name: coTfsLssSendSwitchStateSelectiveSequence
title: coTfsLssSendSwitchStateSelectiveSequence
syntax: long coTfsLssSendSwitchStateSelectiveSequence( dword vendorId, dword productCode, dword revisionNo, dword serialNo );
description: The function sends a switch state selective messages and waits for the response.

parameters.name: vendorId
parameters.description: Vendor-ID part of the LSS address.

parameters.name: productCode
parameters.description: Product code part of the LSS address.

parameters.name: revisionNo
parameters.description: Revision number part of the LSS address.

parameters.name: serialNo
parameters.description: Serial number part of the LSS address.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
